output.context: FINAL verification after 2 fix cycles for DQA-001 (btn-tertiary hover white-on-white) and DQA-002 (regression: base-state charcoal-on-charcoal).
output.compositionNotes: Overall dark mode layout matches Figma reference. 3-column grid, dark charcoal card backgrounds, lime/accent border, white heading text, taxonomy pills with accent backgrounds, 'VIEW RESOURCE' btn-tertiary links with arrows -- all visually consistent with the Figma design.

verificationResults.description: Non-hovered dark mode resource cards: btn-tertiary text visibility
verificationResults.evidence: archive-dark-resource-nohover screenshot shows 'VIEW RESOURCE' text and arrow clearly visible as light/white text on dark charcoal card backgrounds. All three resource cards show legible btn-tertiary text. No white-on-white or charcoal-on-charcoal regression.

verificationResults.description: Hovered dark mode resource cards: btn-tertiary text color on accent bg
verificationResults.evidence: archive-dark-resource-hover screenshot shows first card with accent lime-green background on hover. 'VIEW RESOURCE' text and arrow appear as dark/charcoal color on the bright accent background -- properly readable with good contrast.

verificationResults.description: Non-hovered dark mode policy cards: btn-tertiary text visibility
verificationResults.evidence: archive-dark-policy-nohover screenshot shows 'VIEW RESOURCE' btn-tertiary text clearly visible as light text on charcoal policy card backgrounds. All three policy cards (Academic Integrity, Campus Safety, Student Bill of Rights) show legible btn-tertiary text.

verificationResults.description: Hovered dark mode policy cards: btn-tertiary text on accent bg
verificationResults.evidence: archive-dark-policy-hover screenshot shows first policy card with accent lime-green background on hover. 'VIEW RESOURCE' text appears as dark charcoal on the accent background -- correctly readable.

verificationResults.description: Light mode blog cards: btn-tertiary text visibility
verificationResults.evidence: Light mode blog section shows 'LEARN MORE' btn-tertiary text as dark/charcoal text on cream/off-white background -- properly visible and readable with good contrast.

Side-by-side comparison of Figma screenshot (node 811:59920) with implementation at 1440w shows matching: 3-column card grid layout, dark charcoal backgrounds, lime/accent card borders, white heading/body text, accent-colored taxonomy pills, 'VIEW RESOURCE' arrows, 'FILTER BY TOPIC' dropdown, 'SHOW/PER PAGE' selector, 'LOAD MORE' button. Overall composition, visual weight, and element positions are consistent.

Full-page screenshots across all breakpoints (375, 768, 1024, 1440) in Chromium, plus 768/1024/1440 in Firefox and WebKit, show no visual artifacts, broken layouts, or contrast issues. All archive sections (blog dark/light, resource dark/light, policy dark/light, team, testimonial) render correctly.

DQA-001.original: btn-tertiary hover was white-on-white in dark mode cards
DQA-001.fix: Added :hover/:focus/:group-hover overrides for btn-tertiary text color
DQA-001.result: Hovered cards now show dark charcoal btn-tertiary text on accent background -- fully readable

DQA-002.original: Regression where base-state selectors made non-hovered text invisible (charcoal-on-charcoal)
DQA-002.fix: Removed base-state selectors, kept only interactive-state selectors
DQA-002.result: Non-hovered dark mode cards show light/white btn-tertiary text on charcoal background -- fully readable

screenshotsCaptures.note: Firefox and WebKit at 375px failed to capture due to very tall full-page screenshot size limitation. Chromium 375w captured successfully.

notes.description: Firefox and WebKit browsers failed to capture 375px full-page screenshots due to extremely tall page content (14 archive sections). All other widths captured successfully across all three browsers. Chromium 375px captures are sufficient for mobile verification.
